name: Brian's Chocolate Mint Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until soft; gradually add sugar and blend until creamy.
2. Mix in beaten egg and extracts.
3. Stir salt and baking powder into flour; stir into butter/sugar mixture.
4. Melt chocolate in water over a double boiler; add to dough.
5. Form into a long roll, approximately 2–3 inches wide.
6. Wrap dough with plastic wrap and chill overnight.
7. Slice dough 1/4 inch thick and place on greased cookie sheet.
8. Sprinkle with non-parallels and press in slightly with back of spoon.
9. Bake at 400 degrees for 8–10 minutes.
10. Cool cookies on rack.
